title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally with a single command-line tool and a built-in model registry.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage local models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers to interact with the Ollama local server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama models for chat, completion, embeddings and tool usage.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, multi-user, dark mode) installable via Docker.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with async, streaming, embeddings and custom model creation helpers.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; chat, pull and manage models from Ruby scripts or Rails apps.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with coloured chat REPL and shell completion.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that connects GitHub Copilot-style completions to your local Ollama models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in production retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that brings local LLM chat powered by Ollama to any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that uses Ollama for 100% local LLM conversations with session memory.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selector and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container image and compose examples for running Ollama in Docker with CUDA or CPU.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake that builds Ollama and exposes a module for declarative NixOS deployment with GPU passthrough.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that adds a slash command to query local Ollama models and insert results into your notes.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin to run local LLM prompts inside notes via Ollama without leaving the editor.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container for CI pipelines needing local LLM endpoints.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# SDK for Ollama with .NET 6+ support, streaming chat and embeddings in a single NuGet package.
